self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Wandering Striker (Awakened form; this is a quest-exclusive weapon from Kazuha's Story Quest, capped at Refinement 1 — no R5 tier exists): Normal/Charged/Plunging Attack hits release an Accursed Spirit dealing AoE Physical DMG equal to 180% ATK, triggerable once every 8s; approximated as bonus Normal/Charged/Plunging Attack DMG (mirrors the identical Hewing Gale proc on Kagotsurube Isshin, which this blade is remade into at the end of the quest). The accompanying HP restoration is not modeled (non-combat). The wielder's own DMG output is always decreased by 50% while wielding this blade (modeled as an unconditional all_dmg_ -0.5), making it a net DMG loss overall — consistent with its lore as a cursed, non-obtainable quest item.
